items.title: Study the pattern
items.body:
Workbook lesson 11: To need / To prefer. Read the sentences, listen, and repeat.

Examples:
• I need I prefer
• I need to work I prefer my home
• I need to study I prefer my school
• I need to go I prefer my work

items.text: I need to work I prefer my home

items.prompt: Eu preciso trabalhar Eu prefiro minha casa
options: I need to work I prefer my home
I need to work I prefer my home 3.
You need to work I prefer my home
home my prefer I work to need I

items.text: I need to study I prefer my school

items.prompt: Eu preciso estudar Eu prefiro minha escola
options: I need to study I prefer my school
school my prefer I study to need I
I need to study I prefer my school 3.
You need to study I prefer my school

items.answer: I need to go I prefer my work
I need to sleep I prefer my city
